summary: Matched the first block of ftIceClimber/Nana functions by moving several routines out of asm/melee/ft/chara/fticeclimber.s into src/melee/ft/chara/ftIceClimber/fticeclimber1.c. The PR added C implementations for helper cleanup around sa.nana.x222C, grounded and aerial SpecialN start actions, simple animation callbacks, empty callbacks, and transition wrappers. It also added the needed ftIceClimber header prototypes, an item function prototype for func_802C17DC, and changed SpecialAttrs_Nana.x222C from u32 to uint to match call sites. The PR body states it depended on #706 and resolved most of #601; review activity was an approval with no written comments.

key_files.role: Removed the now-matched assembly for func_8011F16C, func_8011F190, ftIceClimber_SpecialN_StartAction, ftIceClimber_SpecialAirN_StartAction, lbl_8011F318, lbl_8011F354, lbl_8011F390, lbl_8011F394, lbl_8011F398, and lbl_8011F3B8; retained later unmatched labels and added/kept globals such as lbl_8011F500.
Added matched C implementations and required includes for fighter helpers, item code, and HSD_GObj access.
Added prototypes for newly matched ftIceClimber functions and existing referenced static/commented helpers.
Changed SpecialAttrs_Nana.x222C type from u32 to uint.
Removed an extra blank line; no substantive API change evident.

what_changed: Implemented func_8011F16C in C: obtains Fighter data from HSD_GObj, compares an input uint against fp->sa.nana.x222C, and clears x222C plus OnDeath2 and OnTakeDamage callbacks when it matches.
Implemented func_8011F190 in C: returns early if fp->sa.nana.x222C is zero, otherwise calls func_802C17DC on that value and then delegates cleanup to func_8011F16C.

Implemented ftIceClimber_SpecialN_StartAction: clears throw flags, ftcmd var0, and Nana x222C; enters action state 341 with extern float constants lbl_804D9838/lbl_804D983C; calls func_8006EBA4; assigns callback x21BC_callback_Accessory4 to lbl_8011F500.

Implemented ftIceClimber_SpecialAirN_StartAction: includes a MUST_MATCH-only unused stack byte array, clears the same state fields, branches on fp->sa.nana.x224C, initializes vertical self velocity from ftIceClimberAttributes->x4 on first use, sets x2250 from lbl_804D9838 or lbl_804D9840, enters action state 342, calls func_8006EBA4, and installs lbl_8011F500 as the accessory callback.
Implemented simple animation-end callbacks lbl_8011F318 and lbl_8011F354 using ftAnim_IsFramesRemaining before calling func_8008A2BC or func_800CC730.
Implemented lbl_8011F390 and lbl_8011F394 as empty C callbacks, and lbl_8011F398/lbl_8011F3B8 as wrappers for func_80084F3C and func_80084EEC.
Added includes for code_80081B38.h, ft_unknown_006.h, code_8027CF30.h, and baselib/gobj.h to support the newly matched C.
Moved local forward declarations from fticeclimber1.c into fticeclimber1.h, including prototypes for the newly matched functions and several still-static/commented helpers.
Adjusted the Nana special attribute field x222C to uint, consistent with func_8011F16C and func_802C17DC signatures.
smart_moves: Factored the x222C cleanup sequence into func_8011F16C and reused it from func_8011F190, mirroring the assembly behavior while avoiding duplicated C for clearing x222C and callbacks.

Used extern declarations for existing rodata float labels lbl_804D9838, lbl_804D983C, and lbl_804D9840 instead of inventing named constants, preserving matching constraints when semantic names were not yet known.
Preserved callback labels such as lbl_8011F500 and lbl_8011F318 rather than overnaming uncertain action callback functions.
Used a MUST_MATCH guarded unused stack allocation in ftIceClimber_SpecialAirN_StartAction, explicitly documenting a stack-shape matching tactic without affecting normal builds.
Changed x222C from u32 to uint and declared func_802C17DC(uint), aligning struct and external API types with the matched code path.
Kept simple no-op and one-call callbacks in C, removing assembly for functions that do not need complex reconstruction.
decomp_lessons: For fighter action start routines, matching often depends on the exact order of state-field clears, Fighter_ActionStateChange_800693AC arguments, post-change helper calls, and callback assignment.
When an unknown fighter-specific field is passed to an item/system helper, update both the struct field type and the helper prototype together to avoid casts or mismatched codegen.
Do not force semantic names for callback labels when evidence is weak; retaining lbl_ names is preferable for searchable, match-first decomp progress.
MUST_MATCH conditionals can be used to preserve unused stack artifacts while keeping the intent visible to future maintainers.
Short animation callbacks commonly match as `if (!ftAnim_IsFramesRemaining(gobj)) transition(gobj);`; this pattern recurs across fighter code.
Assembly removal may require making still-assembly labels global when C code needs to take their address as callbacks.
naming_conventions: Public Ice Climbers action-entry functions use `ftIceClimber_SpecialN_StartAction` and `ftIceClimber_SpecialAirN_StartAction` style names.
Unknown or callback-like functions without recovered semantics remain address labels such as `lbl_8011F318`, `lbl_8011F354`, and `lbl_8011F500`.
Unidentified numeric helper functions retain `func_` address names such as `func_8011F16C`, `func_8011F190`, and `func_802C17DC`.
Fighter state fields retain offset-derived names such as `fp->sa.nana.x222C`, `x224C`, `x2250`, `x2200_ftcmd_var0`, and `x2210_ThrowFlags`.
Callback members use descriptive callback-field names when already present, e.g. `x21BC_callback_Accessory4`, `x21E4_callback_OnDeath2`, and `x21DC_callback_OnTakeDamage`.
assembly_or_matching_tactics: Removed the matching assembly block from fticeclimber.s after adding equivalent C to fticeclimber1.c.
Added `#ifdef MUST_MATCH` unused stack storage in ftIceClimber_SpecialAirN_StartAction to satisfy stack/codegen constraints.
Used `(s32) fp->sa.nana.x224C == false` in the aerial SpecialN branch, likely to reproduce the original compare form seen in assembly.
Kept rodata float labels as externs and reused the same label for both f1 and f3 arguments to Fighter_ActionStateChange_800693AC.
Represented callback address assignment directly with `&lbl_8011F500`, matching the assembly load/store of the callback function pointer.
Converted small assembly wrappers and empty functions into minimal C bodies, reducing asm while preserving call behavior.

review_feedback.note: No issue comments or line review comments were present in the provided slice.

follow_up_queries: Find PR #706 to understand the dependency that enabled these ftIceClimber matches.
Find issue #601 to see which ftIceClimber functions remained unresolved after this pass.
Search later PRs for ftIceClimber x222C, x224C, and x2250 to recover semantic names for Nana special state fields.
Search later PRs for lbl_8011F500 to see whether the accessory callback was eventually named.
Search for other uses of MUST_MATCH unused stack arrays in fighter action code for reusable matching patterns.
